allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\mingw64\\bin\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:ProgramFiles","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>$null | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell($gh = "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { & $gh --version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:ProgramFiles" -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 FullName })
